heading: Today
text: Mostly sunny, mixing with afternoon clouds. Breezy, much milder.

heading: Friday
text: Rising chance of showers, mainly after noon, except chance late southeast.
temperature: Mid 40s to mid 60s, northwest to southeast

heading: Saturday
text: Chance of snow showers northern mountains.
temperature: Valleys 40s north, upper 40s to mid 50s south
